title: iberis carnosa subsp. lereschiana
intro: Iberis carnosa subsp. lereschiana, also known as Dwarf Candytuft, is a small, perennial flowering plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been found to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Iberis carnosa subsp. lereschiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
